extra.reason: Superseded by data-vb-event analytics attribute system. The 'data-track' proposal was reframed to 'data-vb-event' to match the canonical vb:* namespace (see <meta name="vb:*"> taxonomy). Implementation: src/lib/analytics.js handleDocumentClick + extractDeclarativeProps. Docs: site/src/pages/docs/attributes/data-vb-event.html. Properties via data-vb-event-* dataset → camelCase props. Auto-wired by the analytics runtime on boot.
Shipped: reading-progress component with progressive enhancement (CSS scroll-timeline + JS fallback). Doc page + demo + future-wc updated.

Superseded: avatar-group functionality already covered by <user-avatar> + <layout-cluster data-layout-overlap>. See site/src/pages/docs/elements/custom-elements/user-avatar.html (Avatar Group section). Adding a wrapper component would violate IA rule #2 (enhancement is a layout behavior on existing elements, not a new component).

Shipped: breakpoint-specimen with viewport + container (data-observe) modes. Pure-CSS active highlight via @media for viewport mode; ResizeObserver for container mode. Doc page + demo + sidebar entry + future-wc updated.

Shipped: data-weight, data-rollup (sum|weighted-sum|avg|max), data-heatmap (auto|low-good|high-good) on <th>. Decision-matrix is now a recipe documented on the data-table doc page. Verified math + sort + heatmap in browser.

Shipped: <quadrant-grid> generic 2x2 with x/y axis labels, q1..q4 quadrant titles (Cartesian), draggable opt-in DnD via drag-surface, data-x/data-y coordinate pinning. Verified basic + SWOT + stakeholder-map demos in browser; quadrant-grid:move event fires with correct from/to indices. Doc page includes both recipes.

Shipped: <risk-register> composes <data-table> + <quadrant-grid> from one <template> source. Severity computed via product rollup; low-good heatmap. Side-by-side at >=64rem, stacked below. Verified math (4*3=12, 2*5=10, 5*3=15) and dot positioning in browser.

Shipped: retrospective-board recipe doc section added to kanban-board doc page + standalone demo at demos/examples/demos/kanban-retrospective.html. No new component required — kanban-board already supports arbitrary <section data-column> children with data-column-color.

Shipped: <traceability-matrix> auto-discovers row/col source elements via CSS selectors, renders an RTM intersection grid as <data-table>, supports comma-separated link values + orphan flagging + chain highlight via data-state-highlighted on source elements page-wide. Verified Story×Persona demo: 3 stories link correctly, comma-separated 'p-sarah,p-jordan' renders 2 checkmarks, orphan story flagged with ⚠, click-to-highlight propagates to source cards.

Shipped: <burndown-chart> wraps <chart-wc type=line> with two series (Actual + Ideal). Auto-computes ideal slope from start/end/total; supports weekends=exclude (flat over Sat/Sun); 3rd template cell renders a Scope changes aside under the chart. Verified in browser: Sprint 14 ideal 42->0 in 12 days, Sprint 15 with +5/-2 scope changes shown.

Shipped: <product-roadmap> (renamed from <roadmap> per HTML5 custom-element naming rule). Interactive themes x quarters with auto-discovered <section data-lane> + <article data-start data-end> children. editable mode wires drag-to-reschedule (snap to quarter), drag-to-resize (right edge), and drop-on-lane (HTML5 DnD). today-marker overlay. Verified in browser: 6 bars positioned correctly across 4 quarters with status colors, no FOUC.

Replaced 17 hardcoded fonts.gstatic.com woff2 URLs across theme CSS with @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?...') from the Google Fonts CSS API. Eliminates 404s on art-deco, bauhaus, financial themes and prevents recurrence on the other 14 affected themes when Google rotates font versions. All 715 tests pass; live theme CSS at /cdn/themes/*.css verified serving the new @import.

Fixed both bugs in src/web-components/quadrant-grid/. Bug 1: moved y-label grid-area from column 3 to column 1 (above y-scale); changed text-align to start. Bug 2: replaced fixed --qg-pin-edge clamp with per-pin measurement — JS now uses ResizeObserver to write --qg-pin-half-w / --qg-pin-half-h on each pinned element, and CSS clamps inset positions by those measured values so the pin's bounding box stays inside the quadrant at any coordinate. Verified visually on /docs/examples/demos/risk-register-basic.html: IMPACT label sits above Severe scale; previously-clipped 'Third-party API outage' now renders fully. 715 tests pass.

Shipped bread-crumb web component with HTML-first ol wrap mode, auto-from-pathname mode, .labels override property, BreadcrumbList JSON-LD emission, role/aria-label/aria-current sync. Verified in browser: 4 demo variants render with correct separators, ARIA, and JSON-LD; auto-mode generates trail from pathname with label-map override. Tests 715/715 pass; conformance clean for new files.

Shipped pop-over primitive: native Popover API wrapper with CSS Anchor Positioning support, JS fixed-position fallback, cascade-layer display:none re-assertion (popover_display_gotcha), and pop-over:show/hide events. Three modes: auto (default light-dismiss + ESC), manual (script-only), hint (auto with hint-stack). Anchor auto-detects from popovertarget attribute when data-anchor is omitted. Verified in browser: 5 demo variants render and toggle correctly. Tests 715/715. NOTE: this PR ships the primitive only — refactoring tool-tip/context-menu/drop-down/selection-menu/combo-box to compose pop-over is out of scope and should be filed as a follow-up bead.

Audit delivered at admin/r-n-d/pdf-viewer-token-audit.md with line-numbered token mappings. Refactor of external repo is owned by user (not VB). Filed follow-up bead for the actual VB import once external repo is token-clean.

Shipped Integrations -> Web Components subsection with 5 doc pages + demos for @profpowell/{pdf-viewer,image-editor,code-block,browser-window,code-playground}. Reorganized integrations index into SSG / CMS / Web Components sections. Each component page covers: where to find (npm + GitHub + live demo), install (npm + CDN), demo embedded via browser-window, quick reference, VB token consumption table. Demos use CDN ESM imports for non-VB-deps components and direct /src/main.js + /src/doc-extras.js for browser-window/code-block (already deps). Sample PDF bundled at demos/integrations/web-components/assets/. build-demos.js + setup-preview.js updated to wire the new demo dir. Verified 5 demos in browser: pdf-viewer loads 5 pages, code-block renders 3 blocks with line numbers/highlight/diff, browser-window shows inline + iframe, code-playground + image-editor upgrade and size correctly. Tests 715/715. Conformance clean for new files.

Fixed in this commit. ThemeManager.init() now wires _watchCrossDocumentStorage() which listens for the storage event on vb:theme:current. Same-origin iframes (browser-window demos) re-apply when parent changes brand/mode. Theme CSS pack is lazy-loaded into the iframe via ensureThemeLoaded before applying so the new tokens land in the cascade before data-theme swaps. Verified in browser: parent default→rough→swiss→dark mode all propagate to iframe in <600ms.

All five components composed onto pop-over: tool-tip (def28778), drop-down (fb9d00b4), selection-menu (52a792d3), combo-box (dcbbcf39), context-menu (this commit). Each shipped its own commit per the issue's bisect-friendly recommendation.

Updated browser-console README in ProfPowell/browser-console@627c673: expanded the Vanilla Breeze integration section with the full --bc-* ← --color-* mapping table, linked to src/utils/external-components.css as the canonical bridge, and documented the override semantics (no !important on the bridge — per-instance --bc-* still wins).

Updated epub-reader README in ProfPowell/epub-reader@69bf46b: replaced the inaccurate --vb-color-* claim with the actual set of bare VB tokens the 0.1.0 bundle reads, organized into a Color/Typography/Spacing/Shape/Reader table.

Wave 2 View Transitions rolled out via shared viewTransitionSwap helper across kanban-board, story-map, chart-wc, user-journey, empathy-map, impact-effort. site-map-wc tree mode verified CSS-only (no VT needed).

Shipped: src/web-components/stepper-wc/ with all 4 modes (formatted/token/enum/numeric) + long-press accel; ElementInternals form participation; ARIA spinbutton + :state(at-min/max); reuses data-stepper visual hooks. Docs landed at /docs/concepts/numeric-inputs/ (decision guide) and /docs/elements/web-components/stepper-wc/ (reference); admin/syntax.md data-stepper rows now link to both. Smoke-tested in Chrome — all 8 demo modes upgrade and step correctly. Commits d5b9f797 (feat) + 5ec7514a (regen).

Shipped: src/web-components/status-wc/ with 11 built-in variants (live/recording/streaming/error/online/running/away/paused/busy/offline/stopped) + CSS-only custom-variant extension. ARIA role=status + aria-live=polite by default; data-live=off opts out. prefers-reduced-motion + @media print collapse pulse to steady. Docs at /docs/elements/web-components/status-wc/ with adjacency disambiguation table (vs status-message / notification-wc / toast-msg). Smoke-tested in Chrome — all 21 demo entries upgrade with correct color/animation/size, position=only hides label, custom 'deploying' variant works via CSS-only extension, status-wc:change event fires correctly. Commits 82f7549c (feat) + d8bd19fb (regen).

Fixed. Grid-overlay reserve set: every reachable display string is appended to .stepper-value as a hidden grid-area sibling, with the visible display overlaying on top. Browser sizes the track to the widest reserve at full font fidelity (length-as-proxy fails — 'medium' renders wider than 'critical'). Candidates: enum→all labels, token→all values, formatted/numeric→min/max/current+magnitude seeds+growing-reserve at runtime. Also added: min-inline-size:max-content on host + flex-shrink:0 on buttons/value-cell to survive flex-parent shrinkage. Public displayText getter so demos/authors can read the formatted string cleanly. After fix: Δ0 across 40 step-ups + 80 step-downs for all 8 demo modes. Commit a78001b0.

Shipped: src/web-components/reaction-bar/ — persistent in-flow chips + auto-rendered trigger composing pop-over for the palette. Component is presentational; single reaction-bar:toggle event covers both interaction paths (chip toggle and palette pick); setCount(name, count, { mine }) updates after backend confirms. Adjacency cross-links added on selection-menu + emoji-picker doc pages. Smoke-tested in Chrome: all four paths work (toggle ON, toggle OFF, palette add new, read-only). Commit chain on feature/vb-7ixr branch.
